---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect routing, doctor selection, host synthesis, or memory behavior.
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened?

Describe the output or behavior that felt wrong.

## Input

Paste the user input that triggered the behavior.

## Expected behavior

What should `clinic` have done instead?

## Failure type

- [ ] Triggered when it should not have
- [ ] Failed to trigger when it should have
- [ ] Wrong routing mode
- [ ] Redundant or weak doctor selection
- [ ] Flattened disagreement into fake consensus
- [ ] Produced generic advice instead of a diagnosis
- [ ] Memory update was unsafe or unclear
- [ ] Other

## Relevant files

If known, link the affected rule, eval, doctor, or memory file.
